_comment: Claude Code Audio Hooks - Default Configuration Template
_description: This file contains the default configuration for Claude Code Audio Hooks. Copy this to user_preferences.json and customize as needed.
_comment_audio_theme: Audio theme: 'default' for voice recordings, 'custom' for non-voice chimes. Change this one line to switch all audio.

enabled_hooks._comment_notification: ✅ ENABLED - Plays when Claude needs authorization ('Do you want to proceed?')
enabled_hooks._comment_stop: ✅ ENABLED - Plays when Claude finishes responding
enabled_hooks._comment_pretooluse: ✅ ENABLED - Plays before EVERY tool execution
enabled_hooks._comment_posttooluse: ✅ ENABLED - Plays after EVERY tool execution
enabled_hooks._comment_userpromptsubmit: ✅ ENABLED - Plays when you submit a prompt
enabled_hooks._comment_subagent_stop: ✅ ENABLED - Plays when background tasks complete
enabled_hooks._comment_permission_request: ✅ ENABLED - Plays when permission dialog appears
enabled_hooks._comment_posttoolusefailure: ✅ ENABLED - Plays when a tool execution fails
enabled_hooks._comment_subagent_start: ✅ ENABLED - Plays when a background task starts
enabled_hooks._comment_teammate_idle: ✅ ENABLED - Plays when an Agent Teams teammate goes idle
enabled_hooks._comment_task_completed: ✅ ENABLED - Plays when an Agent Teams task is completed
enabled_hooks._comment_stop_failure: ✅ ENABLED - Plays when API error occurs (rate limit, auth failure, etc.)
enabled_hooks._comment_postcompact: ✅ ENABLED - Plays after context compaction completes
enabled_hooks._comment_config_change: ✅ ENABLED - Plays when configuration files change during session
enabled_hooks._comment_instructions_loaded: ✅ ENABLED - Plays when CLAUDE.md or rules files are loaded
enabled_hooks._comment_worktree_create: ✅ ENABLED - Plays when a worktree is created for isolated tasks
enabled_hooks._comment_worktree_remove: ✅ ENABLED - Plays when a worktree is removed/cleaned up
enabled_hooks._comment_elicitation: ✅ ENABLED - Plays when an MCP server requests user input
enabled_hooks._comment_elicitation_result: ✅ ENABLED - Plays after user responds to an MCP elicitation

playback_settings._comment_queue: Enable audio queue to prevent overlapping sounds
playback_settings._comment_max_queue: Maximum number of audio notifications in queue
playback_settings._comment_debounce: Minimum milliseconds between same notification type (prevents spam)

notification_settings._comment: Desktop notification mode: audio_only, notification_only, audio_and_notification, disabled
notification_settings._comment_per_hook: Override the global mode for specific hooks. Omit a hook to use the global mode.

tts_settings._comment: Text-to-speech mode - speaks context-aware messages. Requires: macOS (say), Linux (espeak/spd-say), Windows (SAPI)

_usage_notes: OPTIMAL CONFIGURATION - 4 Essential Hooks + Desktop Notifications
Set enabled: true to hear spoken messages.
Customize per-hook messages in the messages object.
Run 'scripts/view-hook-log.sh' to monitor hook triggers in real-time.
